items.headline: प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी मलेशिया के दौरे पर रवाना, पीएम अनवर इब्राहिम से करेंगे मुलाक़ात
whyItMatters: इमेज स्रोत, Ashley Allen-ICC/ICC via Getty Images बीसीसीआई ने आईसीसी अंडर-19 वर्ल्ड कप जीतने वाली टीम इंडिया के खिलाड़ियों, कोच और सपोर्ट स्टाफ़ के लिए 7.5 करोड़ रुपये के इनाम की घोषणा की है. ये जानका
summaryParagraphs: इमेज स्रोत, Ashley Allen-ICC/ICC via Getty Images बीसीसीआई ने आईसीसी अंडर-19 वर्ल्ड कप जीतने वाली टीम इंडिया के खिलाड़ियों, कोच और सपोर्ट स्टाफ़ के लिए 7.5 करोड़ रुपये के इनाम की घोषणा की है. ये जानकारी बीसीसीआई सचिव देवजीत सैकिया ने दी है. उन्होंने कहा , "हमारी अंडर-19 टीम ने जिस तरीके से हरारे में इंग्लैंड को हराया, उससे बीसीसीआई और पूरा देश बहुत ख़ुश है. टीम टूर्नामेंट में एक भी मैच हारे बिना चैंपियन बनी है." सैकिया ने बताया कि बीसीसीआई ने टीम की परफ़ॉर्मेंस देखते हुए 7.5 करोड़ रुपये इनाम की घोषणा की है, जो टीम के खिलाड़ियों, कोच और सपोर्ट स्टाफ़ में बांटा जाएगा. यहां पढ़ें- भारत ने इंग्लैंड को हराकर जीता अंडर-19 वर्ल्ड कप, वैभव सूर्यवंशी बने प्लेयर ऑफ़ द मैच और प्लेयर ऑफ़ द टूर्नामेंट For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

Her passion lies in exploring culinary arts, travel, style, relationships, health and literature through her writing. Smita brings a wealth of expertise in the digital realm, stemming from her previous roles at Zee News, Dainik Jagran, and India Today. items.headline: $40 billion blunder! South Korean crypto exchange accidentally sent 6,20,000 Bitcoins to users — Here's what happened
whyItMatters: South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb has apologised after it mistakenly transferred over $40 billion worth of bitcoins to customers as part of a promotion event, AFP reported on 7 February. Th
summaryParagraphs: South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb has apologised after it mistakenly transferred over $40 billion worth of bitcoins to customers as part of a promotion event, AFP reported on 7 February. The accidental deposit of 6,20,000 Bitcoins , worth over $40 billion, into the wallets of 695 affected users, briefly prompted a selloff on the platform, as per the report. Almost all of the tokens (around 99.7%) have been recovered and the platform said it would use its own assets to cover the losses, it added. The company added that it blocked trading and withdrawals for the impacted accounts within 35 minutes after the error occurred on 6 February. AFP cited local reports, which said that Bithumb originally meant to send some 2,000 won ( ₹ 123.76) to each customer as part of a promotional event, but mistakenly sent 2,000 bitcoins per user instead. In its statement on 7 February, the exchange said: “We sincerely apologise for the inconvenience caused to our customers due to the confusion t For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Web.

items.headline: Exclusive: 'Until he plays Tests, he isn’t a big 'cricketer'—Sooryavanshi’s father
whyItMatters: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smoked 15 sixes and 15 fours at a strike rate of 218.75 during a brutal and breathtaking knock in the U-19 World Cup final against England at the Harare Sports Club in Zimbabwe. B
summaryParagraphs: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi smoked 15 sixes and 15 fours at a strike rate of 218.75 during a brutal and breathtaking knock in the U-19 World Cup final against England at the Harare Sports Club in Zimbabwe. Back home in his village in Bihar’s Samastipur district, his family had hardly caught any sleep, while his coach’s phone in Patna was buzzing with congratulatory messages and strange requests: “Sir, mera beta do saal ka hai, usko cricketer Vaibhav bana dijiye (My son is two years old, make him like Vaibhav).” For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Times of India.

items.headline: Think. Over the week
whyItMatters: The analysis of the Union Budget for 2026-27 was our Editorial section’s highlight of last week. The thrust on infrastructure (rail and freight), proposals on rare earth corridors, semiconductors and
summaryParagraphs: The analysis of the Union Budget for 2026-27 was our Editorial section’s highlight of last week. The thrust on infrastructure (rail and freight), proposals on rare earth corridors, semiconductors and AI were welcomed. That this Budget was shorn of populism was also appreciated. The Budget’s credible and conservative architecture was welcomed, overall the boxes were ticked. The progress on India-US trade deal was another major topic for comment in our Editorial section. Though the agreement is yet to signed, US President’s announcement of cutting tariffs from 50% to 18% on Indian exports is good news. However, conflicting announcements on agricultural trade remains a matter of concern. On the 16th Finance Commission recommendations, our Editorial says that the panel has struck a fair balanc For the full story and latest updates, read the complete article. Source: Business Line.
